title: Health Economics & Outcomes Research
description: The HEOR module provides specialized tools for health economics and outcomes research, including a Claims Explorer for analyzing healthcare utilization and cost data, and visualization tools for contracts and value-based care performance. It supports payers, providers, and life sciences researchers in quantifying the economic burden of disease and treatment value.
tips: Use the Claims Explorer to analyze healthcare resource utilization patterns within defined cohorts before building cost-effectiveness models.
Filter claims data by payer type, care setting, and time period to isolate the most relevant cost components for your research question.
Combine HEOR outputs with population-level estimation results to contextualize economic findings within a comparative effectiveness framework.
Use the Visualizations & Contracts panel to track performance against value-based care agreements and quality benchmarks.
Document all cost variable definitions and data source assumptions transparently to support peer review and regulatory submissions.
